author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text: We took the Awesome IPFS list and made it a website to make viewing it more fun! Check out https://awesome.ipfs.io for Apps, Tools, Datasets, Videos, Articles and more about IPFS! Huge ^5 to @hacdias and everyone that helped for making this happen👏🏽 👏🏽
